.github/workflows/test.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 11 for the test job.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source/target configuration with the unified release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target instead of release is deprecated in modern Java toolchains and may cause warnings or incompatibilities with newer compiler plugins.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.why_exists: List.get(0) is not deprecated, but the migration recipe enforces the use of the new Java 21 API List.getFirst() for better readability and safety (throws NoSuchElementException instead of IndexOutOfBoundsException). This is a polishment change as the old code compiles and runs on Java 21.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisSentin.general_idea: Replace String.format calls with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
Replace String.format calls with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
Replace String.format calls with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
Replace String.format calls with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
Replace String.format calls with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/OSDete.general_idea: Replace deprecated single-string argument in Runtime.exec with a String array to avoid shell parsing issues and deprecation warnings.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/OSDete.why_exists: Runtime.exec(String) is deprecated since Java 1.1 and may cause security or parsing issues; while it still compiles, modern Java versions and linters flag it, and the array form is the required safe pattern.

src/test/java/redis/embedded/BaseTest.ja.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) calls with the Java 21 List.getFirst() method for cleaner syntax.
